creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2007-06-18 14:04:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/smplayer  .pkg-plist.swp Makefile distinfo 
                         pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    multimedia/smplayer/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  smplayer intents to be a complete front-end for mplayer,from
  basic features like playing videos, dvds, vcdsto more advancing
  features like support for mplayer filters,edl lists, and more.
  
  WWW: http://smplayer.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/112535, ports/113679
  Submitted by:   Diego Depaoli <trebestie at gmail.com>, Yinghong.Liu <liu_yinghong at yahoo.com.cn>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.229     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile

  1.1       +65 -0     ports/multimedia/smplayer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/smplayer/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +5 -0      ports/multimedia/smplayer/pkg-descr (new)
